query:
insert into equipment_items
                (kind, canonical_name, display_name, status, approved_at,
                 brand, model)
            values ('telescope', 'sky-watcher esprit 100 ed',
                    'Sky-Watcher Esprit 100 ED', 'approved', now(),
                    '', 'Sky-Watcher Esprit 100 ED')
            returning id
